pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)Mickey Mouse Dweller is a fast, violent stalker that turns a familiar cartoon shape into something hostile.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)Its horror comes from how quickly it changes from strange to dangerous.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Presence$()$(br2)It wastes little time and feels much more aggressive than slow stalker mods.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)Its strength is speed, shock, and the twisted use of a recognizable shape.
